name: Bridgeton Onized
description_short: Bridgeton Onized Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Cumberland County, NJ since 1939, offering personal loans, vehicle financing, credit cards, and online banking.
description_long: Bridgeton Onized Federal Credit Union (BOFCU) has been operating as a community-focused credit union in the greater Cumberland County area of New Jersey for over 80 years, establishing itself as a trusted financial institution for local members. The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services designed to serve members at different life stages, including vehicle loans, Visa credit cards, personal loans, share accounts, and digital banking solutions. BOFCU distinguishes itself through personalized member service and debt management assistance, with testimonials highlighting staff responsiveness and willingness to work with members to restructure payment plans for financial stability. The institution maintains two physical branch locations in Cedarville and Bridgeton, NJ, and provides modern digital access through online banking and a mobile app. As an NCUA-insured credit union, BOFCU operates on a not-for-profit model where member interests theoretically take priority over shareholder profits, though the website provides limited detail on specific rates, terms, or membership eligibility criteria beyond serving the Cumberland County area.
services: Vehicle loans for new and used cars
Visa credit cards with Mastercard ID Theft Services
Debt restructuring and payment plan assistance
Member service via phone (856-692-4000) and email
pros: Long-standing community institution with 80+ years of operating history since 1939
Two physical branch locations in Cedarville and Bridgeton for in-person service
Staff demonstrates willingness to restructure debt and work with members on payment plans
Offers Visa credit card with ID Theft Services from Mastercard included
Mobile app and online banking available for remote account access
Member testimonials cite quick and responsive staff support
NCUA-insured deposits as a federally chartered credit union
cons: Website provides no information on loan rates, APRs, or specific terms for any products
Limited details on membership eligibility requirements or field of membership
No pricing transparency for credit card rewards, annual fees, or benefits
Geographic limitation to Cumberland County area may restrict membership
Minimal information about specific loan amounts, approval timelines, or application process
best_for: Cumberland County, NJ residents seeking personalized banking relationships and debt restructuring
Members needing vehicle financing with local branch support
Long-term community members preferring not-for-profit financial institution structure
diagnosis: BOFCU is best for existing or prospective members in the Cumberland County, NJ area who value personal service, local branch access, and willingness to work on debt restructuring. The main caveat is that the website lacks critical transparency on rates, terms, and loan amounts, making it impossible to compare offerings against competitors or understand true costs before application.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Bridgeton Onized — Cedarville, NJ Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: Bridgeton Onized — NCUA-insured credit union in Cedarville, NJ. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
